name: Rating
goal: Capture human feedback on chat responses or content via thumbs up/down or 1..N stars, in one form-associated control.
description: Two-mode feedback control. In thumbs mode, two side-by-side buttons toggle between up/down/null with aria-pressed. In stars mode, max buttons form a radiogroup with optional half-star precision via pointermove offset, click-to-clear, and arrow-key navigation. Form-associated via ElementInternals so the resolved value participates in surrounding <form> submissions when name is set. Always emits ce-rating-change with a uniform detail shape.

props.name: allowHalf
props.description: Stars mode only — half-star precision via pointer offset.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Disables interaction; surfaces aria-disabled on the host.

props.name: name
props.description: Form-association name; when set, the value participates in form submissions.

props.name: value
props.description: JS-typed value: 'up'|'down'|null in thumbs mode, number 0..max in stars mode. Attribute is parsed mode-aware.

events.name: ce-rating-change
events.description: Fires whenever the user commits a new value (click, keyboard, or programmatic .value setter when emit=true).

cssVariables.name: --ce-rating-size
cssVariables.description: Per-instance icon size; size attribute drives default values.

sideEffects.description: ElementInternals.setFormValue when name is set, so the rating participates in surrounding form submissions.

a11y.notes: Thumbs are aria-pressed buttons; stars are role=radio with aria-checked. Arrow keys cycle values; Escape clears. readonly is announced via aria-disabled.
